critical.description: Safety-critical events. Never share throughput pressure with analytics.

operational.description: System operational events. Scheduler completions, health checks.

content.description: Content pipeline events. Higher throughput, replayable.

commerce.description: Product and listing events. Auditable for compliance.

analytics.description: Analytics/social events. High volume, ephemeral. Storm-tolerant.

isolation_rules: Safety-critical streams NEVER share throughput with analytics
Storm in analytics does NOT impact safety or governance
Content storms are isolated from commerce operations
Each partition class has independent consumer groups
